text: Your vessel is a tanker in ballast and the two vessels are interlocked after a collision. After ensuring all people are well taken care of, you try to separate the two vessels. What should be your greatest concern?

options.text: That the separation may cause sparks that can possibly ignite the oil or any other flammable substances

explanation: When separating vessels, friction can generate sparks or heat. On a tanker, this poses an extreme risk of igniting flammable vapors, which could lead to an explosion or fire, making safety precautions paramount.
